x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist for OT Security enables AI-powered alert triage, incident summarization, and threat analysis for operational technology environments. Without this plugin, OT security teams cannot leverage generative AI to accelerate response to OT-specific threats.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_name: Now Assist for OT Security Installed
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Install Now Assist for OT Security from the ServiceNow Store.
